ㅤ

I'm literally in heat rn, come at me

edit: was* in heat, we good now

Sylus version coming...y'all should know how I work by now, gl.

Guys???

moving on,

What are some of y'alls fanfic icks?

Just a disclaimer, anyone is allowed to write fanfic how they want, it's just a sharing of personal opinion 😶‍🌫️ also it's just ff, it'll never be that serious 😭

My #1 ick is cringy dialogue, sometimes it'll be so bad I have to stop reading the fic 🏌‍♀️ especially if it's the "reader" saying cringy stuff cause it just throws off the immersion so much. Like NO I am not saying that 😃

Speaking of immersion, I am notttt a fan of fics being written in 1st person, idk why but it feels too personal, almost like I'm being exposed for what I'm reading 😭 my fav is 2nd pov cause it just feels like the perfect amount of immersion/story telling

I also don't like when they make the charecter so out of character to the point of...it's not the character anymore 😭 (at least if there's no ooc mention for such drastic changes)

I usually don't really care if someone makes a character act a little non canon cause everyone usually has their own view on how a character acts, but when it's like turning a gentleman character into a rapist or something I'm just 🏌‍♀️🏌‍♀️🏌‍♀️ like how tf did you interpret that

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down

ㅤ

ㅤㅤ
